prerequisites.value: Dex 13; Wis 13; Perfect Style; Quick Draw; base attack bonus +9 or monk level 9th.

description.value: **Benefit:** When using Perfect Style, you double the range increment of any thrown weapon you wield. You can spend 1 ki point as a swift action to imbue a number of thrown weapons equal to your Wisdom bonus with the returning or seeking weapon special ability for 1 round.
